title: Estimated heartbeats in a lifetime (millions)

source.name: Estimated from published resting heart rates and median lifespans

notes: Illustrative. Calculation: (resting bpm × 60 × 24 × 365 × median lifespan) ÷ 1,000,000. Humans shown above 1B due to modern medicine extending lifespan past the 'natural' baseline.
